$comment: Telemetry-only hook configuration (no directive delivery). Use this when you want to collect data but are not yet ready to receive audit directives. Replace {OBSERVABILITY_PATH} with the absolute path to the llm-observability repo.

PostToolUse.description: Audit telemetry: captures tool calls, agent spawns, code changes to QDrant

Stop.description: Audit telemetry: aggregates session summary and flushes metrics
